formulas.name: Diagonal Product of a Matrix
formulas.variables: a, b, c, d (elements of a 2x2 matrix)

formulas.name: Determinant of a 3x3 Matrix
formulas.formula: A = a(ei - fh) - b(di - fg) + c(dh - eg)
formulas.variables: a, b, c, d, e, f, g, h, i (elements of a 3x3 matrix)

formulas.name: Inverse of a 2x2 Matrix
formulas.variables: a, b, c, d (elements of a 2x2 matrix)

formulas.name: Inverse of a 3x3 Matrix
formulas.variables: A (determinant of a 3x3 matrix), adj A (adjoint of a 3x3 matrix)

formulas.name: Cramer's Rule for 2x2 Matrix
formulas.variables: Δ (determinant of the matrix), Δx, Δy (determinants of matrices obtained by replacing column 1 with column of constants)

formulas.name: Cramer's Rule for 3x3 Matrix
formulas.variables: Δ (determinant of the matrix), Δx, Δy, Δz (determinants of matrices obtained by replacing column 1 with column of constants)

formulas.name: Rank of a Matrix
formulas.formula: Rank of A = n (where n is the number of non-zero rows or columns in the echelon form of A)
formulas.variables: A (matrix), n (number of non-zero rows or columns)

formulas.name: Equivalence of Matrices
formulas.formula: A = E B (where E is an elementary matrix)
